gist.headline: Dear Diary, I'm AI
gist.blurb: A new community app has bloomed! JournalGen joins the writing showcase, bringing AI-powered journaling to the hive.
gist.summary: Added JournalGen to the community app showcase under the writing category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore JournalGen, a new AI-powered writing tool built by the community.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee writing in a journal or diary, representing the new JournalGen writing app. Cozy desk setting with a retro monitor.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, writing in a small leather journal with a pixelated quill pen. A retro computer monitor in the background glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) text. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
